underlying_goal: Maintain correctness of the classic/multipass rule engine documentation and code, fix Gen2 rule-hit parity bugs, and commit/push the changes
friction_detail: Initial 'commit and push' resulted in 'Everything up-to-date' confusion, requiring the user to manually interrupt and supply the explicit push command twice.
brief_summary: User wanted doc accuracy verification, Gen2 pairing parity fixes, and commits pushed; Claude diagnosed the onMatch streaming bug, fixed it without regressions, and pushed successfully.
